tierDescriptions.tier1: Reach out this week. Accessible rate, strong fit, video delivery confirmed or likely. No agent, no formal process — a direct DM is the right move.
tierDescriptions.tier2: Start outreach once Tier 1 is in motion. Either needs one verification step first, has a rate card, or is a formal brand ambassador with a managed process.
tierDescriptions.tier3: Save for a bigger campaign. Signed talent — agents, formal rate negotiations, exclusivity clauses to navigate. Right fit, wrong moment for an early-stage programme.
